error[E0308]: mismatched types
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/llama-3.1-70b/declarations/array_decl_3/sample_004/target.rs:36:64
   |
36 |                 a[i][j][k] = (i + 1) * 10000 + (j + 1) * 100 + (k + 1) as i32;
   |                                                                ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ expected `usize`, found `i32`

error[E0277]: cannot add `i32` to `usize`
  --> benchmark_results/2026-05-10T00-24-35/llama-3.1-70b/declarations/array_decl_3/sample_004/target.rs:36:62
   |
36 |                 a[i][j][k] = (i + 1) * 10000 + (j + 1) * 100 + (k + 1) as i32;
   |                                                              ^ no implementation for `usize + i32`
   |
   = help: the trait `Add<i32>` is not implemented for `usize`
   = help: the following other types implement trait `Add<Rhs>`:
             `&usize` implements `Add<usize>`
             `&usize` implements `Add`
             `usize` implements `Add<&usize>`
             `usize` implements `Add`
